title: Rise Up in Fury

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hear me in the darkness, Lord
As I fall upon my knees
My spirit's crushed within me, Lord
My heart begins to freeze
My enemies have struck me down
Left me in the dust to dwell
Ancient shadows closing in
Like living death, this hell

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rise up in Your fury, Lord
Strike down those who hunt my soul
Let Your justice roll like thunder
Make Your enemies pay their toll
In Your faithful love, destroy them
Let Your mercy set me free For
I am Yours forever Your servant I will be
VERSE 2
I remember brighter days
When Your hand led me through light
Now I stretch my withered hands
Through this endless night
My throat is parched and yearning
Like a desert waiting rain
Hurry, Lord, before I'm lost
To shadows and to pain

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Rise up in Your fury, Lord
Strike down those who hunt my soul
Let Your justice roll like thunder
Make Your enemies pay their toll
In Your faithful love, destroy them
Let Your mercy set me free For
I am Yours forever Your servant I will be

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Teach me how to do Your will
Guide me on this level ground
Let Your spirit lead me still
'Till all my foes are drowned
In the depths of Your fierce love
In the storm of Your great might
Let them taste what they have given
Darkness swallowed by Your light

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Rise up in Your fury, Lord
Strike down those who hunt my soul
Let Your justice roll like thunder
Make Your enemies pay their toll
In Your faithful love, destroy them
Let Your mercy set me free For
I am Yours forever Your servant I will be

sections.label: Outro
lines: For Your name's sake, Lord
Let me live again
For Your righteousness
Let justice reign

epigraph: he hath made me to dwell in darkness
